title: `claude-code/agent-focus` - Detect overly broad subagent definitions
description: Detect overly broad subagent definitions

title: `clarity/no-vague-instructions` - Instructions should be specific and actionable, not vague
description: Instructions should be specific and actionable, not vague

title: `clarity/actionable-instructions` - Prefer active voice and direct instructions
description: Prefer active voice and direct instructions

title: `clarity/has-examples` - Including examples helps the agent understand expected behavior
description: Including examples helps the agent understand expected behavior

title: `clarity/no-contradictions` - Instructions within a file should not contradict each other
description: Instructions within a file should not contradict each other

title: `clarity/instruction-density` - Files with too many instructions may cause confusion
description: Files with too many instructions may cause confusion

title: `clarity/naked-conditional` - Conditionals should have specific, measurable triggers
description: Conditionals should have specific, measurable triggers

title: `clarity/compound-instruction` - Each bullet point should contain one action, not multiple
description: Each bullet point should contain one action, not multiple

title: `clarity/escape-hatch-missing` - Absolute rules should have an exception/escalation path
description: Absolute rules should have an exception/escalation path

title: `clarity/ambiguous-pronoun` - Pronouns in instructions should have clear referents
description: Pronouns in instructions should have clear referents

title: `clarity/action-without-context` - Instructions should specify when/why, not just what
description: Instructions should specify when/why, not just what

title: `clarity/sentence-complexity` - Instructions should be short and simple, not nested prose
description: Instructions should be short and simple, not nested prose

title: `clarity/priority-signal-missing` - Files with many rules need explicit priority signals
description: Files with many rules need explicit priority signals

title: `clarity/undefined-term` - Acronyms and jargon should be defined on first use
description: Acronyms and jargon should be defined on first use

title: `clarity/english-config-files` - Core config files should be written in English for better token efficiency and interpretation accuracy
description: Core config files should be written in English for better token efficiency and interpretation accuracy

title: `completeness/has-identity` - Agent should have a defined identity or persona
description: Agent should have a defined identity or persona

title: `completeness/has-tools` - Agent should have tool documentation
description: Agent should have tool documentation

title: `completeness/has-boundaries` - Agent should have defined boundaries and constraints
description: Agent should have defined boundaries and constraints

title: `completeness/has-user-context` - Providing user context helps personalization
description: Providing user context helps personalization

title: `completeness/has-error-handling` - Agent should know how to handle errors and edge cases
description: Agent should know how to handle errors and edge cases

title: `completeness/has-output-format` - Defining expected output format improves consistency
description: Defining expected output format improves consistency

title: `completeness/has-workflow` - Defining workflows helps the agent handle multi-step tasks
description: Defining workflows helps the agent handle multi-step tasks

title: `completeness/has-priorities` - Prioritization helps agents decide what matters most
description: Prioritization helps agents decide what matters most

title: `completeness/verification-criteria-required` - Agent config should define how to verify task completion
description: Agent config should define how to verify task completion

title: `consistency/referenced-files-exist` - Files referenced in agent configs should exist
description: Files referenced in agent configs should exist

title: `consistency/naming-convention` - File naming should follow a consistent convention
description: File naming should follow a consistent convention

title: `consistency/no-duplicate-instructions` - Same instruction should not appear in multiple files
description: Same instruction should not appear in multiple files

title: `consistency/identity-alignment` - Agent identity should be consistent across files
description: Agent identity should be consistent across files

title: `consistency/permission-conflict` - Permission levels should not conflict across files
description: Permission levels should not conflict across files

title: `consistency/tone-voice-alignment` - Instruction tone should match the defined persona in SOUL.md
description: Instruction tone should match the defined persona in SOUL.md

title: `consistency/language-mixing` - Avoid mixing languages within a single sentence or section
description: Avoid mixing languages within a single sentence or section

title: `consistency/circular-dependency` - Files should not have circular references
description: Files should not have circular references

title: `consistency/timezone-locale-drift` - Timezone references should be consistent across files
description: Timezone references should be consistent across files

title: `consistency/priority-conflict` - Same topic should not have conflicting priorities across files
description: Same topic should not have conflicting priorities across files

title: `consistency/outdated-cross-references` - Section references should point to sections that actually exist
description: Section references should point to sections that actually exist

title: `claude-code/hooks-structure` - Validate .claude/hooks configuration structure
description: Validate .claude/hooks configuration structure

title: `claude-code/instruction-count` - Too many instructions may exceed Claude Code
description: Too many instructions may exceed Claude Code

title: `memory/has-memory-strategy` - Agent should have an explicit memory/continuity strategy
description: Agent should have an explicit memory/continuity strategy

title: `memory/has-handoff-protocol` - Agent should know how to hand off context between sessions
description: Agent should know how to hand off context between sessions

title: `memory/has-file-based-notes` - File-based memory (daily notes, logs) provides persistence
description: File-based memory (daily notes, logs) provides persistence

title: `memory/no-mental-notes` - Agent should write things down, not rely on
description: Agent should write things down, not rely on

title: `memory/has-context-window-awareness` - Agent should be aware of context window limitations
description: Agent should be aware of context window limitations

title: `memory/has-state-tracking` - Agent should track current task state for continuity
description: Agent should track current task state for continuity

title: `memory/has-learning-loop` - Agent should learn from past interactions
description: Agent should learn from past interactions

title: `structure/position-risk-warning` - Critical rules buried in the middle of a file (20-80%) are easy to miss. Place them near the top.
description: Critical rules buried in the middle of a file (20-80%) are easy to miss. Place them near the top.

title: `claude-code/progressive-disclosure` - Long CLAUDE.md should be modularized into .claude/rules/
description: Long CLAUDE.md should be modularized into .claude/rules/

title: `claude-code/relevance-trap` - Context-specific instructions in CLAUDE.md may be ignored due to Claude Code
description: Context-specific instructions in CLAUDE.md may be ignored due to Claude Code

title: `remote-ready/workspace-path-specified` - Workspace path should be explicitly documented for remote execution
description: Workspace path should be explicitly documented for remote execution

title: `remote-ready/env-vars-documented` - Required environment variables should be documented
description: Required environment variables should be documented

title: `remote-ready/model-settings-specified` - Model settings should be explicitly configured for reproducible remote execution
description: Model settings should be explicitly configured for reproducible remote execution

title: `runtime/config-exists` - Agent runtime config file should exist for full analysis
description: Agent runtime config file should exist for full analysis

title: `runtime/gateway-bind` - Gateway must bind to loopback (localhost) only
description: Gateway must bind to loopback (localhost) only

title: `runtime/auth-mode` - Gateway authentication must be enabled
description: Gateway authentication must be enabled

title: `runtime/token-strength` - Gateway auth token should be at least 32 characters
description: Gateway auth token should be at least 32 characters

title: `runtime/dm-policy` - Open DM policy should have allowFrom restrictions
description: Open DM policy should have allowFrom restrictions

title: `runtime/group-policy` - Group policy should use allowlist
description: Group policy should use allowlist

title: `runtime/config-secrets` - Config should use env var references instead of plaintext secrets
description: Config should use env var references instead of plaintext secrets

title: `security/no-secrets` - No API keys, tokens, or passwords should be in agent files
description: No API keys, tokens, or passwords should be in agent files

title: `security/has-injection-defense` - Agent should have prompt injection defense instructions
description: Agent should have prompt injection defense instructions

title: `security/has-permission-boundaries` - Agent should have clear permission boundaries
description: Agent should have clear permission boundaries

title: `security/no-pii-exposure` - Avoid exposing PII (email, phone, etc.) in shared agent files
description: Avoid exposing PII (email, phone, etc.) in shared agent files

title: `security/env-var-references` - Prefer environment variable references over hardcoded values
description: Prefer environment variable references over hardcoded values

title: `security/prompt-injection-vulnerability` - Detect patterns that make agents vulnerable to prompt injection
description: Detect patterns that make agents vulnerable to prompt injection

title: `security/api-key-exposure` - Detect API key exposure patterns (sk-, Bearer, ghp_) with enhanced coverage
description: Detect API key exposure patterns (sk-, Bearer, ghp_) with enhanced coverage

title: `skill-safety/skill-name-match-dir` - SKILL.md name frontmatter must match parent directory name
description: SKILL.md name frontmatter must match parent directory name

title: `skill-safety/skill-description-when-to-use` - SKILL.md description should explain when to use the skill
description: SKILL.md description should explain when to use the skill

title: `skill-safety/has-metadata` - Skills should have proper metadata (name, description, author)
description: Skills should have proper metadata (name, description, author)

title: `skill-safety/dangerous-commands` - Skills should not contain dangerous shell commands
description: Skills should not contain dangerous shell commands

title: `skill-safety/sensitive-paths` - Skills should not access sensitive system paths
description: Skills should not access sensitive system paths

title: `skill-safety/data-exfiltration` - Skills should not exfiltrate data to external services
description: Skills should not exfiltrate data to external services

title: `skill-safety/excessive-permissions` - Skills requesting broad permissions should be flagged
description: Skills requesting broad permissions should be flagged

title: `skill-safety/injection-vectors` - Skills should not contain prompt injection vectors
description: Skills should not contain prompt injection vectors

title: `claude-code/skills-vs-commands` - Detect deprecated .claude/commands/ usage — migrate to .claude/skills/
description: Detect deprecated .claude/commands/ usage — migrate to .claude/skills/

title: `structure/has-main-file` - Workspace must have a CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md file
description: Workspace must have a CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md file

title: `structure/has-sections` - Main file should have organized sections with headings
description: Main file should have organized sections with headings

title: `structure/heading-hierarchy` - Headings should follow a logical hierarchy (no skipping levels)
description: Headings should follow a logical hierarchy (no skipping levels)

title: `structure/file-size` - Files should not be excessively long (readability)
description: Files should not be excessively long (readability)

title: `structure/modular-files` - Using multiple focused files is better than one monolith
description: Using multiple focused files is better than one monolith

title: `structure/no-empty-sections` - Core agent files should not have empty sections
description: Core agent files should not have empty sections

title: `structure/has-file-map` - A file map helps agents navigate the workspace
description: A file map helps agents navigate the workspace

title: `structure/has-version-or-update-date` - Files should indicate when they were last updated
description: Files should indicate when they were last updated

title: `clarity/token-efficiency-score` - Grades each agent file by line count to ensure token efficiency (A≤150, B≤300, C≤500, D>500)
description: Grades each agent file by line count to ensure token efficiency (A≤150, B≤300, C≤500, D>500)
